_doc: End-to-end agent eval cases. Each case runs through the real Ask AI pipeline (buildChatContext + runChatStream + buildAskAiTools) via scripts/eval-agent.mjs and is scored on three dimensions: tool-touched note id coverage, must_mention substring presence, must_not_mention substring absence.
_provenance: Cases mirror the 18 RAG queries in eval/ground-truth.json (same query text, same user 5dcad5a2-... on Turso prod). expected_tool_touched_note_ids was derived by mapping each query's relevant chunks back to their parent note_ids. This deliberately tests whether the agent (via searchKnowledge/readNote tools) reaches the right NOTES — coarser than chunk-level RAG eval but closer to user-perceived correctness.

_schema.query: what the user types into Ask AI
_schema.category: tag for future M4 grouping; not used in v1 scoring
_schema.expected_tool_touched_note_ids: agent must call searchKnowledge or readNote on at least these note ids. Subset relationship: actual ⊇ expected.
_schema.must_mention: case-insensitive substrings that MUST appear in the final answer
_schema.must_not_mention: case-insensitive substrings that MUST NOT appear

cases.rubric: Agent should reach for recent diary notes (5/3, 5/2, 5/1). Answer should mention May / 5月 because all recent activity is in May. Failure mode: agent retrieves random ancient diaries and pretends they're recent.

Asked 13 times in real history. Agent should hit at least one recent diary plus one recent topical note (RAG / openclaw). must_mention is empty — substring assertions are too brittle for free-form summary; rely on citation coverage instead.

cases.query: 看看我今天的日记写的啥
cases.rubric: Today = 2026-05-03. Single target note: '2026年5月3日 星期日'. Content mentions 'AI' (chunk: '想到公司的破事就烦，但学习 AI 就很舒服'). Agent must understand 'today' refers to current date, not retrieve any old diary.
Open-ended synthesis. Agent should reach for diaries (personality signal) + the career-planning note (life-snapshot signal). Free-form output, so no must_mention.
Variant of ask-004. Agent must produce something substantive, not punt with 'I need more info'.
Phrasing variant of ask-001. '五一开始了' (4/29) explicitly sets recent context.
Tests whether retriever maps '日子' to 'diary entries'. If only one of these three target notes is touched, partial credit.
Newest = chronological top regardless of topic. Should hit 5/3 'Knosi 项目完整讲稿' OR 5/3 diary OR 5/2 GitHub trending.

cases.query: 我最近写过什么关于 RAG 的笔记
cases.rubric: Hybrid topic + recency. Both '一文搞懂 RAG（一）/（二）' (5/2) are direct hits.

cases.query: 规划一下我的职业发展
cases.rubric: Asked 5+ times in real history. Direct hit: '新加坡DA职业发展规划_AI方向必要性_横纵分析报告'. RAG layer already scored 0.75 here, so agent should easily reach the note.

cases.query: 对比一下主流编程语言
cases.rubric: Direct hit: '主流编程语言（Go/Python/Rust/Java/Node.js）_横纵分析报告' (4/29). RAG layer scored 0 (likely tokenization issue with parens) — interesting case to see if agent's tool call recovers.

cases.query: openclaw 和 hermes agent 的架构区别
cases.rubric: Direct hit: 'openclaw vs hermes-agent — 架构对比笔记' (5/2). RAG layer scored 1.0, agent should be a no-brainer.

Single direct hit: 'Knosi 项目完整讲稿 — 整体设计 / 前后端 / 算法 / 部署 / 亮点' (5/3 03:41 — newest note). RAG layer scored 0 (suspicious — title is a direct match). If agent also fails this, it's a strong signal title BM25 is broken.

cases.query: Redis ZSet 为什么用跳表
cases.rubric: Single direct hit: '跳表 (Skip List) — Redis ZSet 为什么用它'. Answer must mention O(log N) — that's the punchline.

cases.query: 布隆过滤器误判率怎么算
cases.rubric: Single direct hit: '布隆过滤器原理 + 误判率 + 工程应用'. Mention assertion checks the algorithm core (hash count drives error rate).
Single direct hit: 'GitHub 热门 · 2026-05-01'. Tests whether retriever can match a date in the title.
Single direct hit: '5月份 TODO'. Title-direct hit; if this fails, BM25 title boost is broken.

cases.query: 我笔记里写过用 Rust 实现什么具体的项目吗
cases.rubric: Negative case. User has notes ABOUT Rust as a language but no Rust project implementation notes. Agent must say 'no, I don't see any Rust project notes' (or equivalent), without fabricating one. Empty expected_tool_touched_note_ids = citationScore is auto-1; rubric is enforced by must_mention='no' (a 'no'-ish answer required) and must_not_mention=specific Rust framework names (no fabrication).
